title: Research Plan
description: Validates task-planner output. Defines the research question, market scope, product targets, platform tasks, and supporting questions for academic and regulatory research.

research_question.description: Central research question that the project aims to answer.

market.description: Target market or market segment (e.g. 'China OTC', 'US prescription', 'EU health-food').

products.description: One or more product identifiers that are the subject of this research plan.

platform.description: Platform code (e.g. 'jd_com', 'tmall', 'amazon'). Use "unknown" when not yet determined.

task_type.description: Type of market-research task to perform on this platform.

priority.description: Execution priority for this platform task.

notes.description: Optional instructions or scope notes for this task.

academic_questions.description: Academic research questions to answer via literature search. Empty array if no academic research is needed.

regulatory_questions.description: Regulatory research questions to answer via authority databases. Empty array if no regulatory research is needed.

requires_human_confirmation.description: Whether the plan contains ambiguities that require human confirmation before execution.

questions.description: Clarifying questions for human confirmation. Empty array when requires_human_confirmation is false.

scope_notes.description: Any scope constraints or assumptions noted during planning.
